channel.title: TODO :: FAU Cyber Security Club
channel.description: TODO Setting up VM guide Club env (have a standard “club environment” for hacking) Glossary page Have an permanent CTF environment running (that can regenerate itself) for newcomers (nix) Contacts page career path map Have this wiki/one page be hackable Wiki layout Home Introduction Getting Started Roadmap Setting up a VM Hacking the club server Club Tools CTF blue teaming red teaming Connections Links
